title: androsace glabrata
intro: Androsace glabrata, also known as the woolly rock jasmine, is a small, flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Androsace glabrata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, with the dried flowers and leaves being used in medicinal preparations.
